readiness.title: Setup readiness
readiness.description: These signals come from the rest of your configuration. Fix the blockers before opening the store.

acknowledge.button: Got it, take me to the dashboard

locale.label: Locale and country
locale.hint: Country, currency and date format the store will use.

sites.label: Sites
sites.hint: At least one active site must exist before selling.

fiscal.label: Fiscal profile
fiscal.hint: Required when the tenant emits electronic invoices.

peripherals.label: Peripherals
peripherals.hint: Printers, scanners and payment terminals are optional.

payments.label: Payment rails
payments.hint: Cash always works; add cards or transfer rails as needed.

modules.label: Modules
modules.hint: Restaurant, KDS and AI modules toggle here.

users.label: Users
users.hint: Add at least one staff user beyond the admin.

ai.label: AI features
ai.hint: AI Co-pilot, OCR and anomaly detection are opt-in.

catalog.label: Product catalog
catalog.hint: Add at least one product before opening the register.

cashSession.label: Cash session
cashSession.hint: Open a cash session before ringing the first sale.

readiness.heading: Ready to open

banner.title_one: Setup incomplete: {{count}} blocker keeps the store from opening.
banner.title_other: Setup incomplete: {{count}} blockers keep the store from opening.
banner.detail: Resolve the pending steps to open your store.

products.title: No products yet
products.description: Add your first product to start selling.

customers.title: No customers yet
customers.description: Add customers to start tracking ledgers and credit lines.
